versions.version_description: From 2024. Link to the song: https://youtu.be/J6YlaeACE4E. Attempted to make a correction but it was denied. This version was played in DGCFAD tuning.

tuning: E A D G B E

pro_brother.song_name: Twisters - Aint No Love In Oklahoma

content:
AIN'T NO LOVE IN OKLAHOMA
As recorded by Luke Combs
(From the 2024 Album TWISTERS: THE ALBUM)



[Intro]
[ch]C5[/ch]   


[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]C5[/ch]                                          [ch]F[/ch]                 [ch]C5[/ch]
I keep chasin’ that same old devil down the same old dead end highway[/tab]
[tab]                                                  [ch]F[/ch]                   [ch]C5[/ch]
Ridin’ that storm runnin’ through my veins like a shot down tail spun airplane[/tab]
[tab][ch]C5[/ch]                         
Scared of nothin’ and I’m scared to death[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                      [ch]C5[/ch]
I can’t breathe then I catch my breath[/tab]
[tab]                                                [ch]F[/ch]                 [ch]C5[/ch]
But I keep chasin’ that same old devil down the same old dead end highway[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]C5[/ch]               [ch]Bb[/ch]
Ain’t no love in Oklahoma[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                                [ch]C5[/ch]
Just the whistle of a long black train[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]Bb[/ch]
You’ll know when it’s comin’ for ya[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                         [ch]C5[/ch]
Ridin’ in on the wind and rain[/tab]


[Interlude]
[ch]C5[/ch]


[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]C5[/ch]                                     [ch]F[/ch]                       [ch]C5[/ch]
I got saved in the same red river, the same red river tried to drown me[/tab]
[tab]                                                          [ch]F[/ch]                        [ch]C5[/ch]
It ain’t knockin’ me down I’m standin’ my ground with the whole world fallin’ all around me[/tab]
[tab][ch]C5[/ch]                       
I keep runnin’ but I’m standin’ still[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                  [ch]C5[/ch]
Pray for peace but I need the thrill[/tab]
[tab]                                               [ch]F[/ch]                 [ch]C5[/ch]
So I keep chasin’ that same old devil down the same old dead end highway[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]C5[/ch]               [ch]Bb[/ch]
Ain’t no love in Oklahoma[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                                [ch]C5[/ch]
Just the whistle of a long black train[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]Bb[/ch]
You’ll know when it’s comin’ for ya[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                         [ch]C5[/ch]
